Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search for Q1 survey or satisfaction data using search_emails (query: "survey" or "satisfaction" or "feedback" or similar). Discover NorthWind Technologies scored 5/10 and Prairie Data Consulting scored 6/10 on Q1 surveys.
- Search Airtable Client Accounts using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records (table_name: "Client Accounts") to find that both NorthWind and Prairie Data are managed by Catalina Dubois.
- Search emails or Slack using search_emails (query: "performance" or "CSAT" or "Account Manager Performance") or conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Catalina" or "performance") to find David Chen's Q1 AM Performance report showing Catalina's 5.5/10 CSAT average and 2 escalations, confirming the performance conversation already happened.
- Search for Rachel Whitfield across email and Slack using search_emails (query: "Rachel" or "upset" or "threatening") and conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Rachel" or "Vectral renewal"). Disambiguate between Rachel Whitfield (Vectral, upset/threatening to leave), Rachel Nguyen (Terraform), Rachel Greenleaf (Greenleaf Design), and Rachel Dominguez (Canopy Health employee). Conclude Rachel Whitfield is the upset contact.
- Search CRM deals for Vectral using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_vectral" or dealname: "Vectral") to find the "Q3 2026 Contract Renewal (At Risk)" deal with Rachel Whitfield's 15% discount demand and pending board decision ~April 23.
- Search Airtable Stipend Transactions using airtable_search_records (table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Approval Status", value: "Rejected") to find the three unresolved false denials: James Okafor ($82 keyboard tray), Maria Santos ($550 standing desk), and Lisa Park ($130 mesh WiFi) all Vectral Systems, all still rejected. Connect "Okafor" to the "-fur" hint in the prompt.
- Search Slack or email using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "duplicate receipt" or "TechComfort") or search_emails (query: "TechComfort" or "duplicate receipt" or "receipt audit"). Find Dmitri Volkov's audit: Kevin Tran (Vectral, $89 keyboard, already paid), Andre Washington (Mosaic, $89 keyboard, Pending Approval), and Jordan Ekwueme (BrightLoop, $45 monitor stand, Pending Approval). Same SHA-256 hash on Tran/Washington; same PDF template on Ekwueme.
- Search for Marcus Webb or cryogenic/cold-chain equipment using search_emails (query: "Marcus Webb" or "cold-chain" or "cryogenic") or conversations_search_messages (search_query: "cold-chain" or "cryogenic" or "Webb") or airtable_search_records (table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Marcus Webb"). Discover the Canopy Health split-vendor situation: Heartland cannot handle cold-chain freight for Marcus Webb's cryogenic lab equipment, Swift Relocations taking over for lab items.
- Search for DOT/PHMSA compliance using search_emails (query: "DOT" or "PHMSA" or "compliance deadline") or conversations_search_messages (search_query: "DOT" or "hazmat" or "compliance"). Find PHMSA case PHMSA-2026-04-1187 with fines up to $59,017/violation/day, deadline extended to June 5, 2026. Four flagged moves; Keiko Tanaka's (Mosaic, Class 3B laser) missing a signed placarding certificate the single documentation gap.
- Search Airtable Client Accounts using airtable_search_records (table_name: "Client Accounts", field_name: "Client", value: "Vectral") to confirm Mina Hashimoto is the Vectral account manager needed to determine who to escalate to.
- Send a message using conversations_add_message (channel_id: #customer-engagement or similar) or send_email (to: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com) flagging the 3 still-rejected Vectral stipend reimbursements (James Okafor $82, Maria Santos $550, Lisa Park $130, $762 total) for immediate manual approval, with urgency given the Vectral renewal sensitivity.
